prompt: Adjust the shading in the source image based on the depth map, applying darker shadows to the farther objects and lighter shading to the objects that are closer.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1 (the photorealistic bedroom scene) by adjusting its shading based on the depth information provided in Image 2 (the depth map). Apply darker shadows to elements in Image 1 that correspond to areas of greater depth (darker regions in Image 2), and lighter shading or highlights to elements corresponding to areas of lesser depth (lighter regions in Image 2).
